channel.title: sdras/awesome-actions Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sdras/awesome-actions Aug 28th, 2020
item.description:
Community Resources

Pull Requests

  • Pull Request Stuck Notifierstars0
  • Set PR Reviewers Based on Assigneesstars117
  • Open or Update PR on Branch Push (with Branch Selection)stars103
  • Automatically Rebase a PRstars489
  • Label PR once it has a Specified Number of Approvalsstars115
  • Add Labels to a PR based on Matched File Patternsstars55
  • Auto-Approve PRsstars197
  • Automatically add Reviewers to PR based on the Configuration Filestars86
  • Add Labels to a PR based on Branch Name Patternsstars120
  • Add Labels to a PR based on Total Size of the Diffstars33
  • Automatically merge PRs That Are Readystars471
  • Verify That PRs Contain a Ticket Referencestars42
  • Create a PR for Changes to your Repository in the Actions Workspacestars525
  • Lint a PRstars85
  • ChatOps for PRsstars52
  • Prefix Title and Body of a PR Based on Text Extracted from Branch Namestars28
  • Merge Pal - Automatically Update and Merge PRsstars25
  • Annotate a GitHub Pull Request Based on a Checkstyle XML-Reportstars105

    • Community Resources

    Utility

  • GitHub Environment Variables Actionstars73 - Expose environment variables such as the branch/tag name, repository slug, and ref slug.
  • Delete Run Artifacts - Deletes all artifacts at the end of a workflow run.
  • Pull the New Go Module Version Into the Proxy Cachestars14 - Ensures the latest version of your Go module is in the proxy cache. Also updates the pkg.go.dev documentation upon release.

    • Community Resources

    Docker

  • Update a Container Repository Description From README.md - Supported Registries: Docker Hub, Quay, Harbor.
  • Convert Branch or Tag Name Into Docker-Compatible Image Tagstars2

    • Community Resources

    Machine Learning Ops

  • Automatically Dockerize A Data-Science Repo As A Jupyter Serverstars90
  • Azure Machine Learning With GitHub Actionsstars57

    • Community Resources

    Notifications and Messages

  • Send an SMS from GitHub Actions using Clockworksmsstars3

item.title: sdras/awesome-actions Aug 27th, 2020

    Dependencies

    • Community Resources

    Linting

item.title: sdras/awesome-actions Nov 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Working with GitHub Actions

    • Official Resources

  • Official Actions organization
    • actions/virtual-environmentsstars2.9k - GitHub Actions virtual environments.
    • actions/runnerstars1.7k - The Runner for GitHub Actions.
  • GitHub Blog Announcement

    • Official Resources

    Workflow Examples

  • actions/starter-workflowsstars4.2k - Starter workflow management.
  • actions/example-servicesstars152 - Example workflows using service containers.

    • Official Resources

    Workflow Tool Actions

  • actions/checkoutstars1.5k - Setup your repository on your workflow.
  • actions/upload-artifactstars929 - Upload artifacts from your workflow.
  • actions/download-artifactstars301 - Download artifacts from your build.
  • actions/cachestars1.9k - Cache dependencies and build outputs in GitHub Actions.
  • actions/github-scriptstars1.1k - Write a script for GitHub API and the workflow contexts.

    • Official Resources

    Actions for GitHub Automation

  • actions/create-releasestars995 - An Action to create releases via the GitHub Release API.
  • actions/upload-release-assetstars543 - An Action to upload a release asset via the GitHub Release API.
  • actions/first-interactionstars94 - An action for filtering pull requests and issues from first-time contributors.
  • actions/stalestars388 - Marks issues and pull requests that have not had recent interaction.
  • actions/labelerstars586 - An action for automatically labelling pull requests.

    • Official Resources

    Setup Actions

  • actions/setup-node: Node.jsstars1.1k
  • actions/setup-python: Pythonstars444
  • actions/setup-go: Gostars393
  • actions/setup-dotnet: .NET core sdkstars281
  • actions/setup-haskell: Haskell (GHC and Cabal)stars62
  • actions/setup-java: Javastars381
  • actions/setup-ruby: Rubystars149
  • actions/setup-elixir: Elixirstars157

    • Official Resources

    JavaScript and TypeScript Actions

  • actions/toolkitstars2.5k - The GitHub ToolKit for developing GitHub Actions.
  • actions/hello-world-javascript-actionstars88 - A template to demonstrate how to build a JavaScript action.
  • actions/javascript-actionstars457 - Create a JavaScript Action.
  • actions/typescript-actionstars703 - Create a TypeScript Action.

    • Official Resources

    Docker Container Actions

  • actions/hello-world-docker-actionstars77 - A template to demonstrate how to build a Docker action.
  • actions/container-toolkit-actionstars58 - Template repo for creating container actions using actions/toolkit.
